title: GTA Online: The Kortz Center Heist
headline: GTA Online: The Kortz Center Heist
subtitle: Missile Lock-On Jammers for New and Existing Vehicles
content:
Missile Lock-On Jammer capability has been added to 50 more existing vehicles (as well as all-new standard vehicles), enhancing their defensive countermeasures.

Use Imani Tech at your Agency Vehicle Workshop, or the Hangar Workshop for aircraft. GTA+ Members can also access this mod at The Vinewood Club Garage’s Vehicle Workshop.

All eligible vehicles that qualify for this upgrade indicate it in the description on their respective vehicle websites.
